## Acceptance criteria

<!-- Tick what's been verified. Do not merge if anything is unticked. -->

- [ ] All declared scenario IDs (P-_ / U-_ / T-_ / E-_) have a passing test
- [ ] Code-line coverage is 100% on every changed source file
- [ ] Lint, typecheck, build, test, e2e green locally and in CI
- [ ] Docs updated (`AGENTS.md`, ADR, API spec, UX matrix, copy bank — as applicable)
- [ ] Locale parity (EN+NL) for every new UI string
- [ ] Theme parity (light + dark) for every new themed surface
- [ ] Accessibility checks: focus visible, ARIA, contrast, reduced-motion
- [ ] No secrets committed; no `console.log` in production paths
- [ ] Decision log updated for material decisions
- [ ] TestRunner agent verdict: PASS
- [ ] Verifier agent verdict: PASS
